# CricketStatsHindi

> हिंदी में क्रिकेट के विस्तृत आँकड़े — The most comprehensive Hindi-language cricket statistics database on the web.

CricketStatsHindi (क्रिकेट आँकड़े) covers international cricket — Test, ODI (वनडे) and T20I (टी20आई) — plus the IPL (आईपीएल), with player career stats, head-to-head comparisons, team records, all-time leaderboards, ICC tournament history, day-by-day cricket history, and full ball-by-ball match scorecards. Every page is written in Hindi (Devanagari, `lang="hi"`).

## Key Facts

- ~500 player profiles with career statistics across all formats, merged by Cricsheet people-registry id
- ~125 international team pages with records and win percentages
- 142 head-to-head player comparison pages
- 8,064 full match scorecards (Test, ODI, T20I, IPL)
- 366 "This Day in Cricket" (आज के दिन) pages — one for every calendar date
- ICC tournament pages: World Cup, T20 World Cup, and Champions Trophy (every edition)
- 19 IPL season summaries
- All-time records leaderboards for Test, ODI, T20I and IPL
- Data sourced from Cricsheet.org open ball-by-ball data (~10,720 matches processed)
- Language: Hindi (हिंदी / Devanagari)

## Sections

- [Home](https://cricketstatshindi.com/index.html): Site overview, search, and entry points to all formats and records
- [Players](https://cricketstatshindi.com/players/index.html): Career profiles for every player — batting/bowling averages, totals and records across all formats (per-player pages at `/players/<id>/`)
- [Teams](https://cricketstatshindi.com/teams/index.html): International team pages with match records and win percentages (per-team pages at `/teams/<country>/`, e.g. `/teams/australia/`)
- [Compare](https://cricketstatshindi.com/compare/index.html): Head-to-head player comparison pages (at `/compare/<player-a>-vs-<player-b>/`)
- [Records](https://cricketstatshindi.com/records/index.html): All-time statistical leaderboards, with per-format pages at `/records/test/`, `/records/odi/`, `/records/t20i/` and `/records/ipl/`
- [Tournaments](https://cricketstatshindi.com/tournaments/index.html): ICC tournament history — `/tournaments/world-cup/`, `/tournaments/t20-world-cup/` and `/tournaments/champions-trophy/`, each with per-edition pages by year (e.g. `/tournaments/world-cup/2011/`)
- [Matches](https://cricketstatshindi.com/matches/index.html): Full ball-by-ball scorecards for every match (per-match pages at `/matches/<match-id>/`)
- [This Day in Cricket](https://cricketstatshindi.com/aaj-ke-din/index.html): आज के दिन — cricket history for each calendar date (per-date pages at `/aaj-ke-din/MM-DD/`)
- [Test](https://cricketstatshindi.com/test/index.html): Test cricket format hub — records, players and teams
- [ODI](https://cricketstatshindi.com/odi/index.html): वनडे (ODI) format hub — records, players and teams
- [T20I](https://cricketstatshindi.com/t20i/index.html): टी20आई (T20I) format hub — records, players and teams
- [IPL](https://cricketstatshindi.com/ipl/index.html): Indian Premier League hub with season summaries (per-season pages by year, e.g. `/ipl/2024/`)
- [About](https://cricketstatshindi.com/about/index.html): About the site and its data
- [Privacy](https://cricketstatshindi.com/privacy/index.html): Privacy policy
- [Sitemap](https://cricketstatshindi.com/sitemap.xml): Full XML sitemap of all pages

## Data Sources

- All cricket data comes from [Cricsheet.org](https://cricsheet.org) — free, open, ball-by-ball cricket data covering Test, ODI, T20I and IPL matches
- Players are keyed by Cricsheet's stable people-registry id, so a player's record is merged across all formats automatically
- Data is factual and statistical in nature

## Contact

- Email: info@cricketstatshindi.com

## Notes

- This is a static HTML site hosted on GitHub Pages with Cloudflare
- All content is in Hindi (हिंदी, Devanagari script)
- Not affiliated with the ICC, BCCI, IPL, or any cricket board or team
